sections.paragraph:
συσχηματίζω to form according to a pattern or mold, form/model after someth. (Aristot., Top. 6, 14, 151b, 8 τὶ πρός τι; Plut., Mor. 83b) pass. w. act. mng. be formed like, be conformed to, be guided by (Plut., Mor. 100f; Eunap., Vi. Soph. p. 111) w. dat. of thing to which one is conformed τῷ αἰῶνι τούτῳ Ro 12:2. ταῖς ἐπιθυμίαις 1 Pt 1:14.—DELG s.v. 1 ἔχω 3.

someth. someth. = something

Aristot Aristot , various works, IV b.c.—List 5

Plut Plut , I–II a.d.—List 5

pass. pass. = passive (either of grammatical form or of passive experience); also used in reference to literary portion=passage

act. act. = active

mng. mng. = meaning(s)

Eunap Eunap , IV–V a.d.—List 5

Vi. Vi. = Vita, Vitae

Soph Soph , V b.c.—List 5

dat. dat. = dative

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 979
